title: Sites Default Files File 2022 09 Somali 20Top 2010 20Landlords 2C 20Inside
content:
NOOCYADA DAGGANAASHADA
1
Waxaad dagganaha siin kartaa kirada, taasoo caadi ahaan socota muddo hal sanno, ama
heshiiska dagganaasho la soo afjari karo waqti kasta oo laga sheego afka ama la soo qoro,
KIRADA WAQTIGEEDA LAGU BIXIYO
taasoo socota muddo bil ilaa bil. Heshiiska dagganaashada la soo afjari karo markii la 8
rabo wuxuu ku siiyaa dabacsanaan, balse kirada waxay ku siisaa sekurity badan. Ma jirto "muddo leysu dhaafo" bixinta kirada. Waxaad xaq u leedahay
kirada maalinta ku qoran qodobada dagganaashada. Waxaa soo dallici
WAXYAABAHA AASAASIGA EE LA ADEEGSADO kartaa khidmadda soo daahidda, hase ahatee taasi waa in ay ku qoran
2 tahay heshiis ogolaada. Markaas kaddib xattaa, lama soo dallici karo
Guri kasta oo la kireesto waa in uu leeyahay kariye iyo foorno, dariishad kasta waa in ay
khidmaddaan haddii kiradaan aan lala soo daahin ugu yaraan 30
leedahay shabaq ilaa inta ka hooseyso dabaqa shanaad, iyo quful shaqeeya oo lagu suro
maalin.
dhamaan dariishadaha iyo albaabada laga soo galo/baxo. Lagaam rabo in aad keentid
+
qaboojiyeyaal, harka dhismooyinka ama waxyaabaha loo isticmaalo qolka dhaqidda, hase
Haddii dagganahaada uu gadaal uga dhaco bixinta kirada ama ku adag
ahatee haddii aad bixisid, waa in aad dayatirtid.
tahay bixinta kirada, waxaa dhici karto in uu xaq u yeesho kaalmada
KULEELKA IYO DANABKA kirada Magaalada ama Gobolka. Fadlan booqo boston.gov/rentalrelief si
3 aad u heshid macluumaad badan.
Dagganaha waxaa laga dalban karaa oo keliya in uu bixiyo danabka haddii ay jiraan
cabbiro u gaar ah adeegga la soo dallaco. Waa in aad bixisid kuleelka iyo biyaha kulul DHEXDHEXAADIN
haddii adiga iyo dagganahaada aadan saxiixin heshiis qoran oo sheega in ay waajib ku 9
tahay dagganaha in uu bixiyo. Haddii adiga iyo milkiilaha hantidaada idin dhexmaro murran aadan
adiga xallin karin dhexdiina, waa in aad ku fakartid dhexdhexaadin.
Dhexdhexaadinta waa hab aan rasmi ahayn aad adiga iyo dagganaha
BAARISTA HORE DAGGANEYAASHA
4 iskudayi kartiin in aad gaartaan xal idinka oo kaashada
In lagu adkeysto tixraacyada iyo caddeynta shaqada waa siyaabaha loo baaro dhexdhexaadiye aan dhinacna la jirin.
dagganeyaasha suurtogalka ah. Waxaad ka dalban kartaa dagganeyaasha suurtogalka ah,
kuwa aan keeni karin tixraac ama kuwa aan u muuqanin in ay leeyahiin ilo dakhli ku filan Haddii aad u baahan tahay dhexdhexaadin, fadlan la xariir Xafiiska
oo joogto ah in ay la yimadaan qof la-saxiixda. Sugidda Guriyeynta (Office of Housing Stability) telefoonka
617.635.4200 ama housingstability@boston.gov.
DAMAANADDA SEKURITIGA IYO KIRADA BISHII LA SOO DHAAFAY
5 SAARIDDA
Bilowga dagganaashada, sharci ahaan waxaad dagganaha ka dalban kartaa in uu horay u 10
bixiyo kirada bishii la soo dhaafay iyo damaanadda sekuritiga oo ah xisaab aan ka badneen Haddii aad dhamaysatay dhamaan talooyinka kale aadna u baahan
xisaabta kirada hal bil. Haddii aad soo aruurisid, waa in aad, taasoo ka tirsan waxyaabo tahay in aad saartid dagganaha, waa in aad soo afjartid dagganaashada
kale, siisid resiidyo ku habboon, sannad kasta bixisid korsaar iyo marka laga hadlo adiga oo adeegsada ogeysiis qoran kaddibna maxkamadda ka dalbatid
damaanadda sekuritiga, in aad lacagta ku shubtid xisaab gaar oo laga furo bangi ku yaal in laga qaad talaabo sharci. Sharciga Ogeysiiska Sugidda Guriyeynta
Massachusetts. Waxaa muhiim ah in adiga aad u hoggaansantid sharuudaha adag ee (Housing Stability Notification Act) wuxuu ka rabaa milkiileyaasha
sharciga damaanadda sekuritiga. hantida in ay geeyaan Ogeysiiska Xuquuqda Dagganaha iyo Ilaha
(Notice of Tenants’ Rights and Resources) isla marka ay geeyaan
KHIDMADAHA SHARCIGA IYO SHARCI DARRADA Ogeysiiska Ka Bixinta (Notice to Quit) ama Ogeysiiska Dib u
6 Cusboneysiin La'aanta Kirada (Notice of Non-renewal of a Lease).
Sharci ahaan, waxaad dagganaha ku soo dallici kartaa kirada bisha kowaad iyo tan dambe,
Sharcigaan wuxuu kaloo ka rabaa milkiileyaasha hantida in ay
damaanadda sekuritiga, iyo khidmadda qufulka. WAA SHARCI DARRO in aad adiga ku
Xafiiska Sugidda Guriyeynta (Office of Housing Stability) siiyaan
soo dallacdid khidmadda haynta, khidmadda xoolaha guri joogga, ama khidmadda
koobiga Ogeysiiska Ka Bixinta (Notice to Quit) ama Ogeysiiska Dib u
geddisleyga/helaha. Waxaad soo dallici kartaa khidmadda geddisleyga/helaha haddii aad
Cusboneysiin La'aanta Kirada), iyo Shahaadada u Hoggaansamida
tahay iibiyaha hantida shattiga haysta aadna heshiis la gashay dagganaha.
(Certificate of Compliance)/Adeegga. Milkiileyaal badan ayaa waxay
qortaan qareeno oo iyaga ku kaalmeeyo wax noqon kara kaali, muddo
DIB-U-FATTASHIDDA GURYAHA KIRADA
dheer qaata, iyo hawl adag. Haddii aad daggan tahay dhismo uu
7
milkiilaha dhinac ka daggan yahay, aadna la kullantid sharuudaha
Inta badan kiisaska, milkiileyaasha hantida wuxuu sharciga ka rabaa in la fattasho
kale, waxaa dhici karto in aad xaq u yeelatid kaalmo sharci oo lacag
guryahooda la kireeyo si loo ogaado haddii ay u hoggaansan yahiin Xeerka Nadaafadda
la'aan ah lagana qaato Mashruuca Qareenada Iskaa Wax u Qabso
Gobolka (State Sanitary Code) in yar kaddib marka dib looga kireeyo dagganeyaal cusub.
(Volunteer Lawyer Project). Fadlan la xariir (617) 603-1700 ama
celhp@vlpnet.org.
